title: Wolf Creek Federal Services saves the wedding day
summary: Every wedding has a snafu here and there. A bridesmaid’s dress has a small tear, the colors of the flowers aren’t quite right, the chicken is a bit dry. title: Sitnasuak Native Corporation Announces Partnership with the National Park Foundation
summary: On August 11, 2022, an event was held at the Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) Nome office for the announcement of our partnership with the National Park Foundation (NPF) to enhance the visitor experience at the Bering Land Bridge National Preserve (BLBNP) in Nome. title: One hospitalization, one medevac and 240 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta August 6-12
summary: During the week of August 6–12, YKHC reports one new in-region hospitalization, one medevac and 240 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta.
